title: fiery clay pot baked german galangal paste tagine
description: an earthy, molten german dish featuring galangal paste, clay pot cooked to perfection, suitable for macrobiotic-friendly diets
instructions: heat the coconut oil in the clay pot over medium heat, sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
add the carrots, celery, and apples, cook until the vegetables are tender.
mix in the galangal paste, cayenne pepper, cumin, coriander, turmeric, and cinnamon, cook for 1 minute.
add the chickpeas, brown rice, and date syrup, stir well.
cover the clay pot and transfer to the preheated oven, bake at 375°F (190°C) for 45 minutes.
remove the clay pot from the oven, stir in the olives and basil, season with salt and pepper to taste.
serve hot, garnished with additional basil if desired
